creator: peter@holm.cc
text:
Various panics while stress testing USB serial adapter:
http://people.freebsd.org/~pho/stress/log/kostik040.html
http://people.freebsd.org/~pho/stress/log/kostik041.html
http://people.freebsd.org/~pho/stress/log/kostik042.html

How-To-Repeat: while true;do
   stty -a < /dev/ttyU0 &
   kill $!
done
